use_cases: Display loading state during async operations like data fetching
Indicate processing in placeholders and skeleton screens
Show background loading activity in dashboards and admin panels
Use as a page or section transition indicator
Provide visual feedback during form submission processes
ai_summary: A canvas-based radial pulse loading animation with 8 animated rays emanating from a center dot. Features pulsing opacity effects and customizable size, color, and text. Lightweight and performant for any loading state scenario.
